title: An AI gateway designed to steal your data

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - An AI gateway designed to steal your data
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/02
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*checkmarx-util-1.0.4.tgz*'
            - '*session.key*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
